Class AbstractGTNetMessageHandler

java.lang.Object
grafiosch.gtnet.handler.AbstractGTNetMessageHandler
All Implemented Interfaces:
GTNetMessageHandler
Direct Known Subclasses:
AbstractAnnouncementHandler, AbstractRequestHandler, AbstractResponseHandler, ExchangeSyncHandler, HistoryquoteExchangeHandler, HistoryquotePushHandler, LastpriceExchangeHandler, LastpricePushHandler, PingMessageHandler, SecurityBatchLookupHandler, SecurityLookupHandler
public abstract class AbstractGTNetMessageHandler extends Object implements GTNetMessageHandler
Abstract base class providing common functionality for GTNet message handlers. Provides utility methods for:
  • Storing incoming messages
  • Building response envelopes
  • Converting between POJOs and parameter maps
Subclasses should typically extend the more specialized AbstractRequestHandler or AbstractAnnouncementHandler instead of this class directly.

  • Method Details

    • storeIncomingMessage

      protected GTNetMessage storeIncomingMessage(GTNetMessageContext context)
      Stores the incoming message in the database.
      Parameters:
      context - the message context
      Returns:
      the persisted GTNetMessage entity

    • storeResponseMessage

      protected GTNetMessage storeResponseMessage(GTNetMessageContext context, GTNetMessageCode responseCode, String message, Map<String, GTNetMessage.GTNetMessageParam> params, GTNetMessage replyToMessage)
      Stores a response message in the database.
      Parameters:
      context - the message context
      responseCode - the response message code
      message - optional text message
      params - response parameters
      replyToMessage - the original request message this responds to
      Returns:
      the persisted response GTNetMessage entity

    • createResponseEnvelope

      protected MessageEnvelope createResponseEnvelope(GTNetMessageContext context, GTNetMessage responseMsg)
      Creates a response envelope for sending back to the caller.
      Parameters:
      context - the message context
      responseMsg - the response message entity
      Returns:
      the MessageEnvelope ready for transmission

    • createResponseEnvelopeWithPayload

      protected MessageEnvelope createResponseEnvelopeWithPayload(GTNetMessageContext context, GTNetMessage responseMsg, Object payload)
      Creates a response envelope with a JSON payload.
      Parameters:
      context - the message context
      responseMsg - the response message entity
      payload - object to serialize as JSON payload
      Returns:
      the MessageEnvelope with payload

    • convertPojoToParamMap

      protected Map<String, GTNetMessage.GTNetMessageParam> convertPojoToParamMap(Object pojo)
      Converts a POJO to a parameter map for message storage.
      Parameters:
      pojo - the object to convert
      Returns:
      map of parameter names to GTNetMessageParam values

    • saveRemoteGTNet

      protected GTNet saveRemoteGTNet(GTNet remoteGTNet)
      Updates the GTNet entity for the remote server.
      Parameters:
      remoteGTNet - the remote GTNet entity to update
      Returns:
      the updated entity

    • saveGTNetConfig

      protected GTNetConfig saveGTNetConfig(GTNetConfig gtNetConfig)
      Updates the GTNetConfig entity for the remote server.
      Parameters:
      gtNetConfig - the GTNetConfig entity to update
      Returns:
      the updated entity

    • triggerExchangeSyncTask

      protected void triggerExchangeSyncTask()
      Hook method for triggering post-acceptance tasks. Override in application-specific handlers to trigger tasks like exchange sync. This should be called after mutual acceptance of data exchange to ensure both sides synchronize their configurations.
